mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, order_time, menu_id, quantity, receive_type, receive_date, store_id, pickup_point_id, address, order_status FROM order_table ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, order_time, menu_id, quantity, receive_type, receive_date, store_id, pickup_point_id, address, order_status FROM order_table WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_table ( user_id, menu_id, quantity, receive_type, receive_date, store_id, pickup_point_id, address, order_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{menuId}, #{quantity}, #{receiveType}, #{receiveDate}, #{storeId}, #{pickupPointId}, #{address}, COALESCE(#{orderStatus}, 'ORDER_REVIEW') )
mapper.update: UPDATE order_table SET user_id = #{userId}, menu_id = #{menuId}, quantity = #{quantity}, receive_type = #{receiveType}, receive_date = #{receiveDate}, store_id = #{storeId}, pickup_point_id = #{pickupPointId}, address = #{address}, order_status = COALESCE(#{orderStatus}, order_status) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_table ( user_id, menu_id, quantity, receive_type, receive_date, store_id, pickup_point_id, address, order_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{mealId}, #{quantity}, #{receiveType}, #{receiveDate}, #{storeId}, #{pickupPointId}, #{address}, COALESCE(#{orderTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
INSERT INTO payment_table ( order_id, payment_method, payment_status, amount ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentStatus}, #{amount} )
mapper.select:
SELECT o.id AS order_id, NULL AS subscription_group_id, o.user_id, u.name AS customer_name, o.menu_id AS meal_id, m.name AS meal_name, o.quantity, m.price * o.quantity AS total_price, o.receive_type, o.receive_date,
NULL AS date_start, NULL AS date_end, NULL AS mon, NULL AS tue, NULL AS wed, NULL AS thu, NULL AS fri, NULL AS sat, NULL AS sun,
o.store_id, s.name AS store_name, s.address AS store_address, o.pickup_point_id, pp.name AS pickup_point_name, pp.address AS pickup_point_address, o.locker_number, o.address, o.order_status,
p.payment_status, 'SINGLE' AS order_type, NULL AS subscription_status, o.order_time, NULL AS subscription_items_text FROM order_table o JOIN meal_table m ON o.menu_id = m.id JOIN user_table u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN store_table s ON o.store_id = s.id LEFT JOIN pickup_point_table pp ON o.pickup_point_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN payment_table p ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT o.id AS order_id, NULL AS subscription_group_id, o.user_id, o.menu_id AS meal_id, m.name AS meal_name, o.quantity, m.price * o.quantity AS total_price, o.receive_type, o.receive_date,
NULL AS date_start, NULL AS date_end, NULL AS mon, NULL AS tue, NULL AS wed, NULL AS thu, NULL AS fri, NULL AS sat, NULL AS sun,
o.store_id, s.name AS store_name, s.address AS store_address, o.pickup_point_id, pp.name AS pickup_point_name, pp.address AS pickup_point_address, o.locker_number, o.address, o.order_status,
p.payment_status, 'SINGLE' AS order_type, NULL AS subscription_status, o.order_time, NULL AS subscription_items_text FROM order_table o JOIN meal_table m ON o.menu_id = m.id LEFT JOIN store_table s ON o.store_id = s.id LEFT JOIN pickup_point_table pp ON o.pickup_point_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN payment_table p ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId}
UNION ALL
SELECT sg.id AS order_id, sg.id AS subscription_group_id, sg.user_id, NULL AS meal_id,
CASE WHEN COUNT(so.id) = 1 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(m.name ORDER BY so.date_start, so.id SEPARATOR ', '), ', ', 1 ) ELSE CONCAT( SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(m.name ORDER BY so.date_start, so.id SEPARATOR ', '), ', ', 1 ), ' 외 ', COUNT(so.id) - 1, '개' ) END AS meal_name,
SUM(so.quantity) AS quantity, SUM(m.price * so.quantity) AS total_price, sg.receive_type, NULL AS receive_date,
MIN(so.date_start) AS date_start, MAX(so.date_end) AS date_end, NULL AS mon, NULL AS tue, NULL AS wed, NULL AS thu, NULL AS fri, NULL AS sat, NULL AS sun,
sg.store_id, s.name AS store_name, s.address AS store_address, NULL AS pickup_point_id, NULL AS pickup_point_name, NULL AS pickup_point_address, NULL AS locker_number, sg.address, NULL AS order_status,
NULL AS payment_status, 'SUBSCRIPTION' AS order_type, sg.status AS subscription_status, sg.order_time,
items_summary.subscription_items_text AS subscription_items_text FROM subscription_group_table sg JOIN subscript_order_table so ON sg.id = so.subscription_group_id JOIN meal_table m ON m.id = COALESCE( so.mon, so.tue, so.wed, so.thu, so.fri, so.sat, so.sun ) LEFT JOIN store_table s ON sg.store_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT daily_items.subscription_group_id, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(daily_items.date_start, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' / ', daily_items.menu_text ) ORDER BY daily_items.date_start SEPARATOR '\n' ) AS subscription_items_text FROM ( SELECT so2.subscription_group_id, so2.date_start, GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT( m2.name, ' ', so2.quantity, '개' ) ORDER BY so2.id SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS menu_text FROM subscript_order_table so2 JOIN meal_table m2 ON m2.id = COALESCE( so2.mon, so2.tue, so2.wed, so2.thu, so2.fri, so2.sat, so2.sun ) WHERE so2.subscription_group_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY so2.subscription_group_id, so2.date_start ) daily_items GROUP BY daily_items.subscription_group_id ) items_summary ON sg.id = items_summary.subscription_group_id WHERE sg.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY sg.id, sg.user_id, sg.receive_type, sg.store_id, s.name, s.address, sg.address, sg.status, sg.order_time, items_summary.subscription_items_text
UNION ALL
SELECT so.id AS order_id, NULL AS subscription_group_id, so.user_id, NULL AS meal_id,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(so.mon, so.tue, so.wed, so.thu, so.fri, so.sat, so.sun) IS NULL THEN '기존 구독 주문' ELSE m.name END AS meal_name,
so.quantity AS quantity, CASE WHEN m.price IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE m.price * so.quantity END AS total_price, so.receive_type, NULL AS receive_date,
so.date_start, so.date_end, so.mon, so.tue, so.wed, so.thu, so.fri, so.sat, so.sun,
so.store_id, s.name AS store_name, s.address AS store_address, NULL AS pickup_point_id, NULL AS pickup_point_name, NULL AS pickup_point_address, NULL AS locker_number, so.address, NULL AS order_status,
NULL AS payment_status, 'SUBSCRIPTION' AS order_type, NULL AS subscription_status, so.order_time,
CASE WHEN m.name IS NULL THEN CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(so.date_start, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' ~ ', DATE_FORMAT(so.date_end, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' / 기존 반복 구독' ) ELSE CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(so.date_start, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' ~ ', DATE_FORMAT(so.date_end, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' / ', m.name, ' / ', so.quantity, '개' ) END AS subscription_items_text FROM subscript_order_table so LEFT JOIN meal_table m ON m.id = COALESCE( so.mon, so.tue, so.wed, so.thu, so.fri, so.sat, so.sun ) LEFT JOIN store_table s ON so.store_id = s.id WHERE so.user_id = #{userId} AND so.subscription_group_id IS NULL ) order_history ORDER BY order_time DESC

SELECT o.id AS order_id, NULL AS subscription_group_id, o.user_id, u.name AS customer_name, o.menu_id AS meal_id, m.name AS meal_name, o.quantity, m.price * o.quantity AS total_price, o.receive_type, o.receive_date, NULL AS date_start, NULL AS date_end, NULL AS mon, NULL AS tue, NULL AS wed, NULL AS thu, NULL AS fri, NULL AS sat, NULL AS sun, o.store_id, s.name AS store_name, s.address AS store_address, o.pickup_point_id, pp.name AS pickup_point_name, pp.address AS pickup_point_address, o.locker_number, o.address, o.order_status, p.payment_status, 'SINGLE' AS order_type, NULL AS subscription_status, o.order_time, NULL AS subscription_items_text FROM order_table o JOIN meal_table m ON o.menu_id = m.id JOIN user_table u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN store_table s ON o.store_id = s.id LEFT JOIN pickup_point_table pp ON o.pickup_point_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN payment_table p ON o.id = p.order_id ORDER BY o.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_table SET locker_number = #{lockerNumber}, order_status = 'READY' WHERE id = #{orderId} AND receive_type = 'PICKUP_POINT'

UPDATE order_table SET locker_number = #{lockerNumber}, order_status = 'READY' WHERE user_id = #{order.userId} AND order_time = #{order.orderTime} AND receive_type = 'PICKUP_POINT' AND (receive_date <=> #{order.receiveDate}) AND (store_id <=> #{order.storeId}) AND (pickup_point_id <=> #{order.pickupPointId}) AND (address <=> #{order.address})
UPDATE order_table SET order_status = 'PICKED_UP' WHERE id = #{orderId} AND order_status = 'READY'

UPDATE order_table SET order_status = 'PICKED_UP' WHERE user_id = #{order.userId} AND order_time = #{order.orderTime} AND receive_type = 'PICKUP_POINT' AND order_status = 'READY' AND (receive_date <=> #{order.receiveDate}) AND (store_id <=> #{order.storeId}) AND (pickup_point_id <=> #{order.pickupPointId}) AND (address <=> #{order.address})
